lines.text: Working, working, working, working, ain't ya? / You don't have no time to lay up
You just tryna be somebody / 'Fore you say you need somebody
Get all your affairs in order / I won't have affairs, I'm yours, girl / Faithful, faithful, faithful, faithful
You hit me like "I know you're there with someone else" / That pussy knows me better than I know myself
On my way from the studio, so get undressed / Let's do the things that we say on text
I want to get straight to the climax / Have you coming all summer like a season pass
You talk like you got what I need / You talk like you got the juice and the squeeze
How far we go always seems to get better with time, hey / Won't ya outsmart me, no / Told me that your brain works better than mine
Tell me I should know ya (I'll get to know you again) / You want me to show ya (I'm gonna show you again) / Now we're in the zone, yeah (Gon' let me all in again, ooh)
And now you're coming over / Over and over and over and over and over again / Over and over again, over and over again
